next_steps: Serum and urine protein electrophoresis with immunofixation and serum free light chain assay
Echocardiogram with global longitudinal strain imaging
Acetylcholine receptor (AChR) and MuSK antibody testing
Measurement of negative inspiratory force (NIF) and vital capacity to monitor respiratory status
24-hour Holter monitoring to evaluate for cardiac arrhythmia
Consideration for tissue biopsy (e.g., abdominal fat pad or endomyocardial) if amyloidosis is suspected
